Convert, merge, split, compress, and pro: Convert, merge, split, compress, and protect PDF documents.
To get your PDF4me API key:\n1. Go to yo:
To get your PDF4me API key:
1. Go to your [API Keys dashboard](https://dev.pdf4me.com/dashboard/#/api-keys/)
2. Sign in or create a free account if you don't have one
3. Copy your API key and paste it here
Converts a Word, Excel, PowerPoint, or i: Converts a Word, Excel, PowerPoint, or image file to PDF format.
Combines two or more PDF files into a si: Combines two or more PDF files into a single PDF document.
Splits a PDF file into multiple document: Splits a PDF file into multiple documents using one of four split strategies.
Reduces the file size of a PDF document: Reduces the file size of a PDF document while maintaining readability.
Adds password protection to a PDF file s: Adds password protection to a PDF file so only authorised users can open it.
Converts a PDF file to an editable Micro: Converts a PDF file to an editable Microsoft Word (DOCX) document.
Converts one or more pages of a PDF file: Converts one or more pages of a PDF file to an image.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
The file to convert. Supported formats:: The file to convert. Supported formats: DOCX, DOC, XLSX, XLS, PPTX, PPT, PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF, BMP, TIFF.
Name for the resulting PDF file (without: Name for the resulting PDF file (without the .pdf extension). Defaults to the original filename.
The first PDF file to merge. It will app: The first PDF file to merge. It will appear first in the merged result.
The second PDF file to merge.
Name for the merged PDF file (without th: Name for the merged PDF file (without the .pdf extension).
How the PDF should be split.
Controls the trade-off between file size: Controls the trade-off between file size and output quality.
The PDF file to protect with a password.
The password users will need to open the: The password users will need to open the protected PDF.
Permissions granted to users who open th: Permissions granted to users who open the protected PDF.
The PDF file to convert to Word format.
Draft processes the entire file in one A: Draft processes the entire file in one API call. High uses per-page processing — best for scanned or image-heavy PDFs.
Language of the text in the PDF. Used to: Language of the text in the PDF. Used to improve OCR accuracy.
Merge all pages into a single Word docum: Merge all pages into a single Word document sheet.
Automatically apply OCR when the PDF con: Automatically apply OCR when the PDF contains scanned images instead of selectable text.
The PDF file to convert to an image.
Pages to convert. Examples: \"1\" (first: Pages to convert. Examples: "1" (first page only), "1,3,5" (specific pages), "2-5" (range), "all" (every page). Defaults to the first page.
Output image width in pixels. Height is: Output image width in pixels. Height is calculated automatically to maintain the page aspect ratio.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
Split After Page — split into two parts: Split After Page — split into two parts at a given page
Recurring Split — split into equal chunk: Recurring Split — split into equal chunks every N pages
Split Sequence — split by a sequence of: Split Sequence — split by a sequence of page counts
Split Ranges — split using custom page r: Split Ranges — split using custom page ranges
